title: Before we ship a Claude model, these teams try to break it.
summary: A video documentary from Anthropic's YouTube channel describes the internal testing and adversarial evaluation teams that stress-test Claude models before release. The video follows the teams' process, their pushback on model issues, and their influence on Anthropic's shipping decisions.
